title: Joe Paulino
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Joe}}
'''Joe Paulino''' provided voices for several Star Wars video games.

==Roles==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' – Imperial Officer, Stormtrooper 3, Weequay
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – Moff [[Yittreas]], Sith apprentice, Starfighter pilot
*''[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan]]'' – [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]], Naboo Prisoner, Coruscant Informer
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' – [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]]
